prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度持续偏高，对物理类考生报 考意愿有正向拉动；本省2026年物理类考生约13.69万人，较2025年（13.95万）减少约1.9%，考生总数小幅下降，竞争略有缓解；内蒙古大学位于呼和浩特市，距重庆较远，地域偏好对重庆考生报考意愿有一定抑制作用；该校在重庆招生占比约0.6%（2025年），属于该校非重点生源省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次趋于稳定、2026年招生计划持平、本省物理类考生小幅减少（竞争略缓解）、学校层次稳中有升但地域偏远等因素，在2025年基准36620名基础上预计位次略前移 （竞争略降）。预测最低位次约36420名，区间35920–36920名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 30538 → 33381 → 33296 → 36594 → 36620, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 3300 positions in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 36620, essentially flat compared to 2024 (only a slight drop of 26 positions), indicating that rankings are stabilizing; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Chongqing was 32 in 2021, 37 in 2022, 37 in 2023, 38 in 2024, and 38 in 2025; the 2026 plan remains at 38, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction, having no direct impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 114th in the Soft Science China University Rankings (2026), with a steady rise from 120th in 2021 to 114th, showing a slight improvement in overall strength; the university's reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion or abnormal admission records; Douyin university popularity ranking is 101st, rated as 'average', with short video exposure at a medium-low level, showing no signs of a sudden surge in application interest; according to public information, the university has B+ disciplines such as Biology and Ethnology, with overall disciplinary strength at a medium level among 211 universities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity, positively driving the application willingness of Physics Category candidates; the number of Physics Category candidates in the province in 2026 is approximately 136,900, a decrease of about 1.9% from 2025 (139,500), with a slight decline in total candidates, easing competition slightly; Inner Mongolia University is located in Hohhot, far from Chongqing, and geographical preference has a certain inhibitory effect on the application willingness of Chongqing candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Chongqing is about 0.6% (2025), making it a non-key source province for the university.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stabilization of historical rankings, unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, a slight decrease in local Physics Category candidates (slightly easing competition), and the university's level steadily rising but with remote geography, based on the 2025 baseline of 36620, the ranking is expected to shift slightly forward (competition slightly reduced). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 36420, with a range of 35920–36920.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 9219 → 6546 → 6131 → 5449 → 5175, showing a continuous forward trend (ranking numbers decreasing year by year), with a cumulative forward movement of about 4044 places in the past 4 years, indicating intensifying competition year by year; in 2025, the baseline is about 5175, moving forward another 274 places compared to 2024, with a clear upward momentum; the university's enrollment plan for History Category in Chongqing was 17 in 2021, 13 in 2022, 13 in 2023, 12 in 2024, and 12 in 2025; the 2026 plan remains at 12, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion, and enrollment slots continue to be tight.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 114th in the Soft Science China University Rankings (2026), with a steadily rising ranking in recent years, still holding strong appeal for liberal arts candidates; the university's reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion or abnormal admission records; Douyin popularity is average, with no signals of sudden increase or decrease in application attention; the university has a certain accumulation in humanities and social sciences, with majors like Law and Chinese Language and Literature having a good reputation within the region.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature are socially popular, positively influencing the application willingness of History Category candidates; in 2026, the province has about 72,100 History Category candidates, a decrease of about 1.7% from 2025 (73,400), with a slight decline in competition; Inner Mongolia University is located in Hohhot, far from Chongqing, and geographical preference has a certain inhibitory effect on the application willingness of Chongqing candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Chongqing's History Category is very small, making it a non-key source province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong trend of continuous forward movement in historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, and the slight decrease in the number of History Category candidates in the province (competition slightly eased), based on the 2025 baseline of 5175, the forward trend and the mitigating effect of the candidate decrease offset each other, and the ranking is expected to move back slightly (competition slightly reduced). The predicted minimum ranking is about 5225, with a range of 4725–5725.
